input.command:
# Mining loop: execute 18 copper ore mines
# Rate limited to 1 per 10s tick, so each mine takes ~10s

for i in {1..18}; do
  echo "Mining copper ore - unit $i/18"
  sm mine copper_ore
  if [ $i -lt 18 ]; then
    sleep 10  # Rate limit: 1 action per 10s tick
  fi
done

# Check final cargo status
sm status
